Researcher Catalogue

MENU

Faculty of Engineering and
Natural Sciences academicians and researchers adopt an inter-institutional
cooperation approach in order to train qualified people and contribute to
society and economy. Our 2025 - 2026 researchers catalogue includes the areas
of expertise, contact information and research topics of the researchers in our
academic staff. Institutions and organisations wishing to cooperate can contact
the researchers working in the relevant fields through their contact
information or ARPROGED.
